input.title: Merge two thoughts without intervening edit does not work
input.body:
## Steps to Reproduce

```
- a
- b
- c
```

1. Set the caret at the beginning of `c` and hit Backspace
2. Set the caret at the beginning of `bc` and hit Backspace

## Current Behavior

Nothing happens

## Expected Behavior

`bc` should get merged into `a` to create `abc`
